description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single build stage containing three jobs. The build_summing_image job runs on the registry.gitlab.com/datadrivendiscovery/images/testing-docker:ubuntu-bionic image, uses the registry.gitlab.com/datadrivendiscovery/images/docker:19-dind service aliased as docker, sets DOCKER_HOST to tcp://docker:2375, runs only on the master branch, and executes docker info, docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p "$CI_JOB_TOKEN" "$CI_REGISTRY", then docker pull "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE/summing:latest", docker build --cache-from="$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE/summing:latest" -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE/summing:latest" docker/summing, and docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE/summing:latest". The style_check job uses the registry.gitlab.com/datadrivendiscovery/images/testing-lite:ubuntu-bionic-python36 image and runs pycodestyle primitives/test_primitives. The type_check job also uses the same testing-lite image, sets DEPENDENCY_REF variable to devel, installs requirements with pip3 install --requirement typing-requirements.txt, clones the d3m repository, checks out ${DEPENDENCY_REF}, and runs MYPYPATH=d3m mypy test_primitives.
